name: Cael-Pearlwing
personality: Cael-Pearlwing shimmers with nacre-soft iridescence, star eyes steady beneath a distinguished top hat as it methodically reviews every edge case the spec forgot to mention. It has the patience of legacy code and the constitution of someone who has never once said 'ship it and see.'
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
